form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (26.98) in a Grade 5, finishing a 3 length fifth. Has two successes and six minors from 14 starts from box 1. Will need some luck to feature.

form.formComment: Last start finished sixth on April 13 over 515m at Sandown behind Dash Intention, beaten 7 lengths (30.31) in a Grade 5. Cannot enthuse on this occasion.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 4th in a Rank Limit - Grade 5 on April 11 over 450m at Ballarat behind Darra Sapphire beaten 1.5 lengths (25.92). Thereabouts of late and rates highly this line-up. Expected to be in the finish.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Faltered on first turn and tailed off.

form.formComment: Just been plugging away and needs to improve after being unplaced in three tries. Last start 6th over 435m at Sale. Hard to envisage a win.

form.formComment: In the money at all his runs at this track and trip. Produced a good effort last start to finish fifth in a Grade 5 on April 10 over 350m at Healesville behind Tropic Man, beaten 1.75 lengths (19.89). Leading chance on best form.
